query:
-- Get all Middlemount Coal (C0161) billing items from Xero
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE c.externalId = 'C0161'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 50;

-- Get all Middlemount Coal services
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0161'
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute -- Get all Middlemount Coal (C0161) billing items from Xero
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE c.externalId = 'C0161'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 50;

-- Get all Middlemount Coal services
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0161'
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC;
